name: uv
description: Python package manager for MCP services and dependency installation.
description_zh: 用于 MCP 服务与依赖安装的 Python 包管理工具。

name: bun
description: JavaScript runtime used by MCP services and related toolchains.
description_zh: MCP 服务及相关工具链使用的 JavaScript 运行时。

name: fd
description: Fast file finder, alternative to find.
description_zh: 快速文件查找工具，find 的替代品。

name: rg
description: Fast text search tool (ripgrep), alternative to grep.
description_zh: 快速文本搜索工具 (ripgrep)，grep 的替代品。

name: lark-cli
description: Lark CLI for workspace and document management.
description_zh: 飞书 CLI，用于工作区和文档管理。

name: gh
description: GitHub CLI for repository and workflow management.
description_zh: GitHub CLI，用于仓库和工作流管理。

name: ntn
description: Notion CLI for managing pages, databases, and workspace content.
description_zh: Notion CLI，用于管理页面、数据库和工作区内容。

name: claude
description: Anthropic's agentic coding tool for the terminal.
description_zh: Anthropic 的终端智能编程工具。

name: codex
description: OpenAI's lightweight coding agent that runs in the terminal.
description_zh: OpenAI 的轻量级终端编程代理。

name: pi
description: AI coding agent for the terminal with multi-model support.
description_zh: 支持多模型的终端 AI 编程代理。

name: hermes
description: AI coding agent powered by Hermes.
description_zh: Hermes 驱动的 AI 编程代理。

name: openclaw
description: Open-source AI gateway and model router.
description_zh: 开源 AI 网关和模型路由。
